game_page_title: Contexto Usa Okay Itak - Aynuitak Urekrek
game_meta_description: Aynuitak ani Contexto a=esinot. a=nuyna itak itak'ipe or wa pataraye wa ipisikip ani a=ehankere ro.
game_fresh_title: a=nuyna itak itak'ipe or wa pataraye.
game_intro: Aynuitak ani itakpo a=numke wa a=nuyna wa. Itasaitak a=ahunke yakun hanke itak a=e=nukare wa ipisikip pon yakun hanke p ne ruwe ne.
game_compact_intro: Your guesses are already sorted from closest to farthest. Push the best ranks first.
game_new_puzzle_confirm_prompt: urekrek asire ya? tan sinot uk wa isam ruwe ne.
game_empty_state_body: “kamuy” ne wa “aynu” ne noyne an yayan itak a=ahunke wa a=nukar ro.
game_default_feedback: Ainuitak ani itakpo a=ahunke wa nekon hanke p ne ya a=eramuoka kuni p ne.
game_new_puzzle_feedback: Asir Ainuitak urekrek a=etokokar wa an.
game_load_failed_feedback: Failed to load the Ainu puzzle data. Please try again.
game_duplicate_guess_feedback: You already guessed "{word}". It is currently ranked #{rank}.
game_lookup_failed_feedback: There was a problem looking up similarity. Please try again.
game_known_word_unmatched_feedback: "{word}" is in the dataset, but it could not be matched cleanly. Try a nearby word.
game_unknown_word_feedback: "{word}" is not available in the current dataset. Try another word.
game_hint_solved_feedback: The proximity hint auto-submitted and solved the puzzle with "{answer}".
game_hint_applied_feedback: The proximity hint auto-submitted "{word}", now ranked #{rank}.
game_length_hint_feedback: Hint: the answer is {count} characters long.
game_no_more_proximity_feedback: No better proximity hint is available right now.
